rulings.Case Title: SHUFEN SU VS. JULIA ISABEL YUEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Referees Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Distribute Remaining Reserves From The Proceeds Of The Sale Of Partitioned Real Property; For Payment Of Fees; And For Discharge Of Referee
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 3, 2015 line 1. OTHER AMY HARRINGTON, Referees' Motion For Order To Distribute Remaining Reserves From The Proceeds Of The Sale Of Partitioned Real Property; For Payment Of Fees; And For Discharge Of Referee GRANTED as requested. No opposition filed. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion On [Proposed] Order To Deposit Surplus Funds, Discharging Petitioner Of Further Responsibility For Disbursing Of Funds; And Excusing Petitioner From Further Hearings Or Participation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 3, 2015 line 2. PETITIONER FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS LLC's Motion On [Proposed] Order To Deposit Surplus Funds, Discharging Petitioner Of Further Responsibility For Disbursing Of Funds; And Excusing Petitioner From Further Hearings Or Participation GRANTED. Surplus funds shall be deposited with the Court forthwith, Petitioner is discharged. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Cross Complaint In Intervention Of Devon J. Bolla Filed On 12/1/14
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 3, 2015 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT NIKHIL BHATNAGAR's Demurrer To Cross Complaint In Intervention Of Devon J. Bolla Filed On 12/1/14 SUSTAINED with 10 day leave to amend for cross-complainant to allege clearly and succinctly, in plain English, conduct that falls within Civil Code 1714.10(c) rather than 1714.10(a). = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer & Demurrer To Cross-Complaint-In-Intervention Filed By Devon J. Bolla On 12/1/14.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 3, 2015 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT MICHAEL YESK's Demurrer To Cross-Complaint-In-Intervention Filed By Devon J. Bolla On 12/1/14. SUSTAINED with 10 day leave to amend for cross-complainant to allege clearly and succinctly, in plain English, conduct that falls within Civil Code 171410(c) rather than 1714.10(a). = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: SUSANA LOZANO VS. KARAVOLOS FAMILY TRUST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 3, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANTS KARAVOLOS FAMILY TRUST and MICHAEL KARAVOLOS' Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint DENIED; allegations are sufficient and proper. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: SUSANA LOZANO VS. KARAVOLOS FAMILY TRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 3, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANTS KARAVOLOS FAMILY TRUST andMICHAEL KARAVOLOS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Causes of action for fraudulent concealment; nuisance; breach of implied warranties; violation of SFRO 37.10B; violation of Civil Code 1941.3 and UCL violation are sufficiently alleged and are not uncertain. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: SOFIA NEW ET AL VS. MANUEL LANGIT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 3, 2015 line 5. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction GRANTED. Bond in the amount of $100,000 shall be posted no later than March 6, 2015. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. PAULO CASTILLO ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 3, 2015 line 10. DEFENDANT PAULO CASTILLO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/RBU)
